summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of PMSalad landing page. All 11 specified requirements passed successfully including hero section fixes, laptop flip animations, AI section shuffle, and CTA routing.
passed_tests: Hero eyebrow renders cleanly without bullet/dot pseudo-element
Hero subtitle uses 'built-in intelligence' wording correctly
Hero background video is visible and playing
Start free and Sign in CTAs route to https://pmsalad-f.vercel.app/
All 4 product screenshots display in Mac laptop mockups
Laptop flip-open animations work on scroll (3/4 laptops animating)
Mobile viewport remains stable with readable content
AI section maintains side-by-side scroll shuffle layout
Cross-team section shows single CROSS-TEAM MOMENT example
No disallowed terms found in visible content
No console errors or GSAP/CSS runtime errors detected
Responsive design functions properly across viewports
